description_long: This is a tall, narrow ladder with a series of evenly spaced horizontal rungs running between two parallel side rails. The side rails appear to be made of a metallic material, likely aluminum or steel, and have a rectangular cross-section. The rungs are also metallic and are integrated into the rails at regular intervals, providing stable footholds. The ladder is straight and does not feature any visible hinges, handrails, or stabilizer bars, suggesting it is designed for leaning against a surface rather than freestanding use. The ends of the rails are squared off, and there are no visible anti-slip feet or other safety features. The overall finish is matte gray, giving it a utilitarian, industrial appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A tall, straight metallic ladder with evenly spaced rungs and rectangular side rails, finished in matte gray. It lacks visible safety features and is designed for leaning use.
description_view_0: A narrow edge-on view showing the thin profile of the ladder, with rungs barely visible.
description_view_1: A side view displaying the full length of the ladder, the rectangular rails, and the evenly spaced rungs.
description_view_2: Another edge-on view similar to view 0, emphasizing the slimness of the ladder.
description_view_3: A side view identical to view 1, showing the rungs and rails clearly.
